---
title: "Lincoln / American Civil War"
---

::: {.callout-note title="Status: provisional pilot"}
Lincoln has a complete Codex-assisted first-pass MIPVU review, but independent
human reliability work and publication-grade historical citations remain
pending.
:::

## Analytical focus

The Lincoln case examines Union and constitutional government as sacred
objects; battlefield death as dedication; national life, rebirth, and healing;
providential judgment; reconciliation; and systematic absences around slavery,
coercion, and agency.

## Explore this case

- [Corpus analysis](../../analysis/corpus-analysis.md)
- [Diachronic analysis](../../analysis/diachronic-analysis.md)
- [Metaphor-system evolution](../../analysis/cluster-evolution.md)
- [Critical metaphor analysis](../../analysis/critical-metaphor-analysis.md)
- [Rhetorical and genre analysis](../../analysis/rhetorical-genre-analysis.md)
- [Absence and agency analysis](../../analysis/absence-agency-analysis.md)
- [Historical enactment and alignment](../../analysis/historical-enactment-alignment.md)
- [Support synthesis](../../analysis/koenigsbergian-support-synthesis.md)
- [Reliability report](../../quality/reliability-report.md)

Return to [all cases](../../../../case-selection.qmd) or continue to the
[cross-case findings](../../../x-case/artifacts/qmd/x-case-overview.qmd).
